      • Constant Field Values

    • SHOOTER_FORMULAS

      public static final List<ShooterConstants.ShooterFormula> SHOOTER_FORMULAS
      List of angles and their corresponding shooter formulas. The formula is used to calculate the RPM of the shooter based on the distance to the target. The min and max values represent the range of that angle.

  • Constructor Details

      public ShooterConstants()
